creator: reel@sympatico.ca
text:
When doing a makeworld, in stage 4, under the lib/libcam section,
it fails and returns a segfault.

===> lib/libcam
Segmentation fault - core dumped
*** Error code 139
Stop in /usr/src/lib.
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/src.
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/src.
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/src.

How-To-Repeat: cvsup with the tag RELENG_4 as before 
Sun May  6 02:07:33 EDT 2001 (EST - GMT -05:00)

and "make world" in /usr/src
